name: ClawSpec
description: OpenSpec-aware project orchestration for OpenClaw channels

enabled.description: Enable or disable the ClawSpec plugin

allowedChannels.description: Optional list of channel ids allowed to use /clawspec

maxAutoContinueTurns.description: Deprecated no-op retained for backward compatibility with older configs

maxNoProgressTurns.description: Deprecated no-op retained for backward compatibility with older configs

openSpecTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for each OpenSpec CLI invocation

workerWaitTimeoutMs.description: Deprecated no-op retained for backward compatibility with older configs

workerAgentId.description: ACP agent id used for background planning and implementation

workerBackendId.description: Optional ACP backend id used for background worker sessions

watcherPollIntervalMs.description: Background watcher recovery poll interval in milliseconds

subagentLane.description: Deprecated no-op retained for backward compatibility with older configs

archiveDirName.description: Directory name used under .openclaw/clawspec/ for archived runs

defaultWorkspace.description: Base directory used for default project browsing and relative /clawspec path inputs

enabled.label: Enable ClawSpec
enabled.help: Enable or disable the ClawSpec plugin

allowedChannels.label: Allowed Channels
allowedChannels.help: Optional list of channel ids allowed to use /clawspec

maxAutoContinueTurns.label: Deprecated Auto Turns
maxAutoContinueTurns.help: Deprecated no-op retained for backward compatibility

maxNoProgressTurns.label: Deprecated No Progress
maxNoProgressTurns.help: Deprecated no-op retained for backward compatibility

openSpecTimeoutMs.label: OpenSpec Timeout
openSpecTimeoutMs.help: Timeout in milliseconds for each OpenSpec command

workerWaitTimeoutMs.label: Deprecated Worker Timeout
workerWaitTimeoutMs.help: Deprecated no-op retained for backward compatibility

workerAgentId.label: Worker Agent
workerAgentId.help: ACP agent id used for background planning and implementation turns

workerBackendId.label: Worker ACP Backend
workerBackendId.help: Optional ACP backend id used for background worker sessions

watcherPollIntervalMs.label: Watcher Poll Interval
watcherPollIntervalMs.help: Background watcher recovery poll interval in milliseconds

subagentLane.label: Deprecated Lane Hint
subagentLane.help: Deprecated no-op retained for backward compatibility

archiveDirName.label: Archive Folder

defaultWorkspace.label: Default Workspace
defaultWorkspace.help: Base directory used for `/clawspec workspace` and `/clawspec use`
